name: Level Up Golf Academy
about: Level Up Golf Academy is a golf training facility focused on player development through data-driven instruction. The academy utilizes state-of-the-art technology, including Trackman launch monitors and video analysis, to measure performance and create customized improvement plans for golfers of all skill levels. With locations in Janesville, including an indoor studio at Limitless Performance and an outdoor partnership with Glen Erin Golf Club, Level Up offers year-round access to lessons, club fitting, simulator rentals, and specialized programs for juniors and adults.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using Trackman technology for precise feedback
Comprehensive new student assessments to create customized improvement plans
Indoor and outdoor locations for year-round training options
Access to PGA professionals and specialized fitness programs

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor for precise ball flight tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and simulator use. Club fitting services are also available if you need equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long is an 18-hole simulator session?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulator session is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Level Up Golf Academy offers junior programs and has certified youth coaches, making it suitable for young golfers.
